matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Foundations of Clinical Psychology is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: This course introduces students to the field of Clinical Psychology and the competencies required within the scientist-practitioner model of Clinical Psychology. These competencies will be developed through taught modules, an extended research project, and clinically relevant placements.
